# AI powered Emoji Generator

> AI-powered web tool that uses flow matching to generate emojis.

Depop Automater reads uploaded product photos using computer vision and automatically generates Depop listing details — including title, description, category, brand, condition, color, style era, and suggested price. It then posts completed listings directly to the user's Depop account via a one-time Chrome extension setup. No manual form filling required.

## Who it's for

Depop sellers, resellers, and secondhand fashion sellers who list items in volume and want to reduce the time spent on admin tasks.

## Pricing

- **Free plan:** up to 4 photos per listing, ad-supported, unlimited AI generation
- **Full Access:** $9.99/month — unlimited photos, automated Depop posting, batch listing queue, video support, priority processing. Cancel anytime.

## Key capabilities

- AI fills in listing title, description, category, brand, condition, color, age/era, and style from photos alone
- Batch queue: generate multiple listings in a session, submit them all at once
- Automated posting: listings post directly to Depop via Chrome extension (one-time setup)
- Supports JPEG, PNG, WEBP photos (up to 10 per listing) and MP4/MOV video
- Custom or Depop shipping, with package size selection
- All Depop categories supported: Tops, Bottoms, Dresses, Outerwear, Shoes, Accessories, Bags, Activewear, Swimwear, Jewellery, Hats, and more
